---
pagetitle: "About | Jubayer Hossain"
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
comments: false
---

::: {.about-hero-container}

::: {.about-hero-section}
# About <span class="hero-accent">Me</span>
:::
::: {.mission-quote-card}
::: {.quote-content}
*"My mission is to harness the transformative power of artificial intelligence to decode the complexities of biological systems, translating vast molecular datasets into actionable insights that can revolutionize healthcare and improve lives worldwide."*

<div class="quote-signature">— Md. Jubayer Hossain</div>
:::
:::

::: {.main-content}
::: {.professional-journey-section}
### Professional Journey

::: {.journey-timeline}
::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-marker}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
**Founder & Chief Executive Officer**
*[DeepBio Limited](https://deepbioltd.com)*
*2022 - Present*

Leading biotechnology company focused on AI-driven drug discovery and personalized medicine solutions. Spearheading research initiatives in computational biology and developing cutting-edge bioinformatics tools for the pharmaceutical industry.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-marker}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
**Founder & Executive Director**
*[CHIRAL Bangladesh](https://chiralbd.org/)*
*2021 - Present*

Non-profit research organization dedicated to advancing biomedical research and training in Bangladesh. Establishing collaborative networks and educational programs to build local capacity in computational biology and bioinformatics.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-marker}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
**Faculty**
*[Center for Bioinformatics Learning Advancement and Systematics Training (cBLAST), University of Dhaka](https://www.cblastdu.xyz/)*
*2020 - Present*

Contributing to bioinformatics education and research capacity building. Developing curriculum and teaching computational approaches to biological problems, mentoring students in genomics and data analysis.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-marker}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
**Visiting Researcher**
*Department of Public Health, Daffodil International University*
*2025 - Present*

Conducting interdisciplinary research at the intersection of public health and computational biology. Collaborating on projects involving health data analytics and epidemiological modeling.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-marker}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
**Instructor**
*Daffodil International University (Micro-credential Academy, AI for Public Health)*
*2022 - Present*

Designing and delivering specialized courses on artificial intelligence applications in public health. Teaching machine learning techniques for health data analysis and developing micro-credential programs.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-marker}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
**Program Lead**
*GSA Bioinformatics Internship*
*2021 - Present*

Leading comprehensive bioinformatics internship programs for students and early-career researchers. Developing hands-on training modules covering genomics, proteomics, and computational biology tools.
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.education-section}
### Education

::: {.education-timeline}
::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-marker}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
**Master of Science in Microbiology**
*Jagannath University, Dhaka*
*2020*

Research Focus: Chikungunya outbreak investigation and infectious disease epidemiology. Conducted comprehensive field studies and laboratory analysis to understand disease transmission patterns and develop prevention strategies.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-marker}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
**Bachelor of Science in Microbiology**
*Jagannath University, Dhaka*
*2019*

Research Project: Antibiotic resistance gene profiling using bioinformatics approaches. Applied computational methods to analyze bacterial genomes and identify resistance mechanisms in pathogenic microorganisms.
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.connect-section}
### Let's Connect

I'm always excited to collaborate on innovative research projects, mentor aspiring scientists, and explore new opportunities in computational biology and AI.

**Contact:** [contact.jubayerhossain@gmail.com](mailto:contact.jubayerhossain@gmail.com)
:::

:::

:::
